_comment: Registry of creative-direction traditions (idea-level DNA). Single source of truth for /idea and any product choosing a concepting lens. Mirrors copy-studio/voice_dna/index.json philosophy: grounded = built from the real school's published work/analyzed specimens; planned = documented roadmap, research pending. The universal toolbox under every tradition lives in idea_kit/.

traditions.fit: Honest wit + product truth; admit-the-flaw; radical simplicity. Use when the product has a real (even awkward) truth to dramatize.
Emotional anthem + cultural courage; human truth over feature; absurdist one-take comedy. Use for brand-feeling moments.
Earned media by design; brand acts not ads; stunt-with-meaning; manifesto film. Use when budget is small and ambition is news.

traditions.school: Feed-native brands (Duolingo/Liquid Death/Nutter Butter/Wendy's/Ryanair) + Shifman meme scholarship
traditions.fit: Remixable formats, brand-as-character, lore, trend-speed, lo-fi. Use to build an owned channel into an organic-reach asset.

traditions.school: AI-era artful short-form; analyzed specimen: Human + AI (TR)
traditions.fit: Giant hand + miniature world + household-object metaphor; tenderness as engine. Ready-made device for insurance/care brands.
traditions.note: Derived from direct frame analysis of the reference video, not secondhand description.

traditions.school: FOOH & kin (Jacquemus/Origiful, Maybelline, CeraVe) + TikTok retention research
traditions.fit: One hyperreal scale/physics violation on the hero product, real-location anchor, 2-second cold open. Sibling of caring-hand-miniature (spectacle vs tenderness).
traditions.note: Saturation warning encoded: the device only works when the violation dramatizes THIS product's truth.

traditions.school: Big Idea craft canon (Sullivan Hey Whipple; Lois; James Webb Young)
traditions.note: Not a voice-like tradition — it IS the ideation process every /idea run follows.

traditions.school: Eisenstein montage, Murch Rule of Six, gestalt, audiovisual congruence research, Pixar color scripts
traditions.note: The craft-science layer media_studio consumes: beat-anchored impacts, collision cuts, micro color scripts, arousal curves.

traditions.school: Binet & Field IPA databank, System1, Kantar, Ehrenberg-Bass
traditions.note: The scientific spine: emotional ~2x profit growth, 60/40 rule, fame campaigns, 12x creative multiplier. Rubric dimension 8 derives from it.
